sentences.arabic: يَلْتَقِطُ الأَبُ صُورَةً لِلْأُسْرَةِ فِي المُنَاسَبَاتِ.
sentences.translationEn: The father takes a photo of the family at occasions.

sentences.translation: Svi stoje ispred kamere i smiješе se.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone stands in front of the camera and smiles.

sentences.translation: Stare fotografije podsjećaju nas na lijepe trenutke.
sentences.translationEn: Old photos remind us of beautiful moments.

sentences.arabic: تُحِبُّ الأُمُّ أَنْ تَحْفَظَ الصُّوَرَ فِي أَلْبُومٍ.
sentences.translation: Majka voli čuvati fotografije u albumu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother loves to keep photos in an album.
Memories are the most precious thing in life.
